passages.title: Passage 1: Cultural Heritage
passages.text: Vietnam has a rich cultural heritage, and preserving it is crucial for future generations. To conserve this heritage, the government and people must collaborate. (1) ______ of Vietnam's traditional customs, monuments, and folk art forms are (2) ______ risk due to modernization and urbanization. Through education and awareness programs, citizens can learn to appreciate and protect (3) _______. Monuments and artifacts, inspired by ancient designs, must be maintained and restored by experts. (4) _______ the rules of preservation, we can ensure that Vietnam's cultural treasures will survive for years to come. Preservation efforts involve both local and international collaboration, encouraging the exchange of knowledge and techniques. It is important (5) ________ the significance of these (6) ________ so they are not forgotten as the world moves forward.

passages.title: Passage 2: Education Paths
passages.text: Graduation is approaching. Are you choosing between university or vocational training? Academic track focuses on high-level qualifications. Vocational track focuses on practical skills. Consider an internship to earn while learning. Choosing a path may seem difficult initially. The right choice of institution will pave the way for future career. Having achieved excellent results, you deserve proper guidance to pick the perfect path.

passages.title: Passage 4: Heritage Reading
passages.text: Cultural heritage is important for preserving national identity. It includes historical sites and traditional customs. Heritage helps people understand their roots. Many countries make great efforts to protect heritage. Governments preserve ancient sites and promote cultural tourism. This creates economic benefits for local communities. Raising public awareness ensures long-term conservation of heritage.

passages.title: Passage 5: Independence
passages.text: Being independent is essential for young students. It helps them manage time and solve problems. Good time management keeps students on track. Setting goals and breaking tasks into smaller parts helps. Making small decisions like organizing materials builds confidence. Students gradually take on bigger decisions. Seeking help shows independence does not mean doing everything alone. Growth mindset means effort leads to improvement. Students become resilient by embracing challenges and learning from mistakes.

options: A. Focus only on academic success
B. More confident in social situations
C. Essential and achieved through practical ways
D. Time management is most important
A. Avoid challenges to prevent mistakes
C. Break large tasks into smaller ones
B. Growth mindset helps handle challenges
A. Never need help from others
C. Know when to seek help effectively
